overall.description: A third-person perspective follows a character with long blonde hair wearing a brown coat as she walks steadily through a desolate mountain canyon. The environment features rocky terrain, patches of tall dry grass, and dramatic overcast skies with snow-capped peaks visible in the distance. The footage appears to be from a high-quality game engine, showcasing cinematic lighting and atmospheric depth.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain valley path with cliff on right side

agents.ego_description: character with long blonde hair walking steadily along a dirt path with a large rock cliff on the right

entered.detail: large layered rock formation running along the right side of the path
distant mountain peak with snow visible under the cloudy sky
dark wooden debris or structural remains scattered on the left side

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path with a massive rock cliff rising immediately on the right side. In the distance, snow-capped mountains are visible under the overcast sky. Sparse patches of dry grass dot the rocky ground, and some wooden ruins appear briefly on the left before the landscape opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland valley approaching rock formations

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk through the valley as the path widens and tall grass appears on both sides

entered.detail: distinctive flat-topped rock formations and buttes visible in the distance ahead
narrowing gap between rock walls marking the entrance to a canyon passage
dense tufts of golden-brown grass growing prominently on both sides of the path
bushes with yellow-green foliage visible on the right side in the distance

segments.scene_description: The landscape opens into a wider valley with tall dry grass growing densely on both sides of the path. The character continues walking toward distinctive layered rock buttes and a canyon entrance visible in the distance. The right-side cliff from the previous section recedes into the background as the terrain expands.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon passage with rock walls on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking into a narrowing canyon passage with steep rock walls rising on both sides

entered.detail: steep layered rock wall rising immediately on the left side of the path
tall rock face closing in on the right side forming a narrow corridor
clusters of bushes with bright yellow flowers growing along the right wall base

segments.scene_description: The path narrows significantly as the character enters a canyon with steep rock walls rising on both sides. Yellow flowering bushes line the right side of the path. The sky becomes partially obscured by the canyon walls, and the distant snow-capped peaks are no longer visible as the character proceeds deeper into the passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an open mountain plateau into the claustrophobic depths of a narrow canyon. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path beside a massive rock cliff, passing sparse dry grass and wooden ruins under an overcast sky with distant snow-capped peaks. As the terrain expands, the cliff recedes and the scene opens into a wide valley filled with dense tall grass, leading the character toward layered rock buttes. The landscape then shifts as the path narrows significantly, drawing the character between steep rock walls lined with yellow flowering bushes. Finally, the canyon walls rise to obscure the sky and hide the distant mountains as the camera proceeds deeper into the passage.
